figures.caption: Fig. 4: Pointwise field prediction error ef (q) = ∥f̂(q) − f⋆(q)∥ on the test set.
Fig. 1: Trajectory comparison in the plane: true dynamics, nominal model, nonholonomic GP, and standard GP.
Fig. 2: Planar trajectory error ∆(t) for the nominal, nonholonomic GP, and standard GP models.
Fig. 3: Constraint violation metric enh(q) = ∥A(q)f̂(q)∥ for the standard and nonholonomic GP models.
